Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A chat session between a user and the AI.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this conversation.

title.description: A short title for the conversation.

updatedAt.description: When the conversation was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message within a conversation.

conversationId.description: The ID of the conversation this message belongs to.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this message.
